text:
and Medicaid SSA DOD from MAX for others (Medicaid date of death from MAX for non-Medicare for 2006) date - MM/DD/YYYY
Null/missing = no date of death (did not die during year)
 D_DOB Date of birth. Source is Medicare for all with Medicare coverage, Medicaid DOB for non-Medicare date - MM/DD/YYYY
 D_AGE Age (in years) at the end of the calendar year XXX
 D_SEX Sex of enrollee F - Female
M - Male
U - Unknown
 D_DISABILITY_CD Disability Insurance Benefit Entitlement to Medicare Justification
